changes.reason: Three of the six worst MAE near-misses failed only because RSI slope exceeded the current 3.6 cap. Moving to 4.4 captures the -638.75 and -392.0 tails while avoiding the extreme 8.94 row that is more likely to overlap protected momentum winners.

Two deep-MAE rows failed only because pullback-from-high was 0.0 to 0.25 versus the current 0.5 floor. Lowering this boundary to 0.0 lets the existing extended-VWAP rejection signature cover fresh-high rejection failures without adding a new broad entry filter.

One deep-MAE near-miss had higher-high distance 7.5 versus the current 7.25 cap. This small boundary expansion completes the observed near-miss box without changing profile routing or option-data policy.

expected_effect: Should reduce worst hidden MAE by letting the already-enabled extended-VWAP rejection veto catch several concrete near-miss tail trades, especially pullback_long and charm_pin_pullback_long heat. Tradeoff is possible loss of some profitable extended-above-VWAP recoveries, so reject if total PnL retention falls below 98%, protected fast/extended-VWAP winners are materially reduced, or kept worst MAE does not improve.
label: extended-vwap-near-miss-tail-repair
rationale: The current best path is a surgical tail repair, not another call-wall tightening or broad entry-quality floor. In run_053 all 24 bad-MAE rows are covered by the extended-VWAP rejection near-miss family, and the six worst entries each missed the enabled veto by one boundary. Broad setup, structure, or VWAP filters retain too little PnL and would damage protected winners; this experiment only widens the existing veto envelope at the exact failed thresholds.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: pullback_long is the top PnL source with $2413.2 over 31 trades but owns the -638.75 worst MAE. Static broad filters either retain only 70-87% PnL or leave worst MAE unresolved, while the enabled extended-VWAP rejection signature has exact near-miss diagnostics.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Extended-VWAP Near-Miss Tail Repair
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Over-widening the veto can block clean extended-above-VWAP winners; validate protected fast-winner and extended-VWAP-winner retention explicitly.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback/charm-pin entries with extended-VWAP rejection geometry that miss the existing surgical veto by only RSI-slope, pullback-from-high, or higher-high boundary.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -513.4, total PnL remains >=98% of run_044, completed trades drop <=10%, pnl_per_exposure_hour stays flat or better, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst heat rows often failed to make meaningful early progress before adverse expansion, while protected fast winners typically resolved quickly. This distinction is visible in intratrade path columns but not fully expressible with current static config.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a small tail sample and block delayed-but-profitable recoveries unless validated against protected UTCs and out-of-sample slices.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: pullback_long or charm_pin_pullback_long entries that fail to print early positive progress or half-TP progress before adverse expansion.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE below current tail levels while retaining >=90% affected-profile PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner entries.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day, high-win-rate, take-profit-only long scalper regime. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so the dominant risk is hidden MAE, recovery duration, and...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Router Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile has positive standalone PnL or lowers combined charm/pin worst MAE, total PnL >=98% of leader, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, no slow trades.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call Wall Acceptance Re-Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 2-3 trades, positive standalone PnL, worst MAE <= -250 initially, no reduction of total PnL below 98% of leader-family base, and no degradation in pullback/charm-wall PnL.
